steps.explanation: Force is defined as the product of mass and acceleration: F = mass × acceleration.
Substitute the given values: mass = 41 kg, acceleration = a m/s\(^2\). So F = 41 × a = 41a.

Evaluate all choices:
  • A: F = 41a. This is mass (41) times acceleration (a), exactly matching F = ma. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: F = 41 + a. Addition instead of multiplication; does not represent the product of mass and acceleration. Eliminated.
  • C: F = 41 − a. Subtraction has no basis in Newton's second law. Eliminated.
  • D: F = a − 41. Reversed subtraction; dimensionally inconsistent and physically meaningless. Eliminated.
